title: 100 Pack Black Plastic Cable Ties 300mm×3.6mm Heavy Duty Strong Nylon Premium Self Locking 12 inch/30 cm Long Zip Tie Wraps
features: Perfect for: Commercial Purposes, Home DIY, Cable Management, Special Events, Workshop, Office, Packaging, or in the Garden
description: Product Description 100 Pack 100*3.6mm Nylon Cable Ties Commercial use: Factory buildings and computer rooms can be used to bundle power cords. It can also be used to fix shelves, organize printer cables, etc. Home DIY: The family can be used to hang knives, small toys, curtain pull loops and the neatness of the tablet TV cable, tighten snack bags, tie garbage bags, fix water pipes, etc. Life: When traveling, we can use it to fasten luggage zippers, tie shoelaces, bicycle brake lines, blow bubbles, and hang balloons and LED lights during parties. Garden: You can tie the plants in the courtyard to the fence of the garden, and you can also fix the pet's cage.
